arts.ttl: this is the impact he’s had on Leeds squad in run-in
arts.sum: Jayden Bogle has unpacked how Daniel Farke’s calm demeanour has radiated throughout the Leeds United team during the run-in, and described how “fantastic” the manager has been for him personally. And, meanwhile, Leeds have not lost a game in which Bogle has scored or assisted this season.

arts.ttl: Leeds United News: Sporting CP’s Hidemasa Morita on transfer radar
arts.sum: Leeds United are claimed to be interested in signing Sporting CP midfielder Hidemasa Morita this summer with Premier League football in view. Leeds United monitoring Sporting CP midfielder Hidemasa Morita – Report

arts.ttl: Leeds United 'prepared' to make 'concrete' transfer bid for Sporting Lisbon ace on one condition
arts.sum: Portuguese outlet Record has today claimed United are "very interested" in Sporting Lisbon holding midfielder Hidemasa Morita. It remains unclear whether the Whites will look to sign Joe Rothwell on a full-time basis and it looks unlikely Josuha Guilavogui will be offered a new contract to extend his Elland Road stay if the club secure promotion to the Premier League.

arts.ttl: ‘Serious candidate’ – Leeds waiting to secure promotion to make concrete offer, player wants transfer
arts.sum: Leeds United are in the driving seat to secure promotion to the Premier League as they are currently leading the Championship table. The Whites are level on points with second placed Burnley and five ahead of Sheffield United, who are in the third spot. arts.ttl: Who is Julian Weigl? Leeds United target Daniel Farke transfer reunion as stance made clear
arts.sum: Farke and Weigl maintain a good relationship, according to Sky Germany, and Leeds are interested in signing the midfielder if they win promotion back to the Premier League. Signing a four-and-a-half year deal, Weigl committed his long-term future to Benfica but he didn't fulfil his contract.

arts.ttl: Leeds United make contact over midfielder transfer but he’ll only join on one condition
arts.sum: Leeds United have reportedly been in contact over a potential summer transfer window swoop for Borussia Monchengladbach midfielder Julian Weigl. The Germany international has had a fine career in the Bundesliga and is now being eyed up as an ambitious target for Daniel Farke’s promotion chasers. arts.ttl: ‘Weathered the storm’ – Oxford United vs Leeds United prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Oxford United vs Leeds United prediction ahead of the Championship clash on Friday. The post ‘Weathered the storm’ – Oxford United vs Leeds United prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville outlines challenge awaiting Leeds United as Premier League solution provided
arts.sum: Gary Neville has warned Leeds United that they might need to risk breaching financial rules if they want to stay in the Premier League next season. Ipswich Town and Leicester City are expected to join Southampton in suffering relegation from the Premier League this season, meaning the three promoted clubs are set to drop down for the second straight year.

arts.ttl: Leeds United forgotten player 'fought hard' for £7.7m transfer as exit confirmed
arts.sum: Rasmus Kristensen has acknowledged that he 'fought hard' for a permanent transfer to Eintracht Frankfurt from Leeds United . "Leeds United can confirm Rasmus Kristensen has signed for Eintracht Frankfurt in a permanent deal, for an undisclosed fee," it reads.

arts.ttl: Leeds United News: David Prutton gives Championship predictions
arts.sum: David Prutton predicts Burnley and Sheffield United results for Good Friday The final four games of the Championship have Leeds in a very good position to claim promotion back to the Premier League, currently five points clear of third place.
